view.title: Validate explicit UC need #12
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for delivery confirmation.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 12 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for delivery confirmation.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for delivery confirmation.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the delivery confirmation process, which includes capturing a customer signature and a photo of the delivered item. However, the prior evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of these functionalities. As a result, the validation is blocked due to a lack of sufficient evidence to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or not.

gaps: No evidence of mobile signature capture functionality.

No evidence of capturing timestamps and GPS coordinates with signatures.
